title: CT17.N18 completed discharge record — Lemma — does the arithmetic criterion rule out all blocks?
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for CT17.N18, the decision node “Lemma — does the arithmetic criterion rule out all blocks?” of tactic CT17 (Target thickening). It refines the common node-proof record with this node's exact identity, completion state, assigned contract evidence, and any required payload or terminal certificate.

tacticId.description: Framework tactic discriminator for CT17.N18. It must be exactly `CT17`, selecting Target thickening (target thickening) as the tactic that owns the decision step “Lemma — does the arithmetic criterion rule out all blocks?” in the exhaustive proof flow.

nodeId.description: Stable graph-node identifier for the obligation “Lemma — does the arithmetic criterion rule out all blocks?”. It must be exactly `CT17.N18` so the evidence, dependencies, outgoing branch, and any terminal result are attributed to this step rather than another node.

nodeNumber.description: One-based ordinal of CT17.N18 within tactic CT17 (Target thickening). It must be exactly 18, matching the N18 suffix and the node's position in that tactic graph.

status.description: Required completion state for CT17.N18. It must be exactly `proved`, meaning that the node's mathematical assertion or construction has been established for the decision obligation “Lemma — does the arithmetic criterion rule out all blocks?”; another lifecycle value does not discharge this concrete node.

dischargedContracts.description: Contract identifiers whose proof obligations are discharged at CT17.N18. The array must contain `S-Dich`; these are precisely the contracts assigned to “Lemma — does the arithmetic criterion rule out all blocks?”. Listing an identifier records discharge status but does not replace the matching typed evidence record required in `contractInstances`.

contains.description: Requires `S-Dich` to occur in CT17.N18's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that gives exhaustive, state-measurable alternatives for the residual class for the obligation “Lemma — does the arithmetic criterion rule out all blocks?”.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract-evidence records that justify CT17.N18 from the recorded branch state. The array must contain at least one instance for every assigned schema: S-Dich (residualClass, alternatives, evidence). Every instance must include its schema discriminator and nonempty evidence as required by the referenced contract definition; together the records must establish the displayed node statement.

schema.description: Contract discriminator for a `S-Dich` evidence instance at CT17.N18. It must be exactly `S-Dich`, identifying the contract that gives exhaustive, state-measurable alternatives for the residual class; the same instance must supply residualClass, alternatives, evidence.

statement.informal: Prove or verify: Lemma — does the arithmetic criterion rule out all blocks?
statement.latex: \textbf{Lemma}\\does the arithmetic criterion rule out all blocks?

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Provide a proof/definition/computation artifact that establishes the displayed statement from the recorded branch state and satisfies every listed contract schema.
